item.title: YouTube has now begun skipping videos altogether for users with ad blockers
item.description:
https://www.androidpolice.com/youtube-videos-skip-to-end-if-you-use-an-ad-blocker/
it's easy as wiping your butt. Just copy and paste the link or click the box in the middle where it tells you to click and hit start. it will show up in your downloads folder. no ads, no interruptions, no overlays. just video. at the highest quality. it's also able to get that 'enhanced 1080p' bullshit they're trying to pull. here's the open source https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp for you all you nerds (i envy you) here's the direct link for the GUI for us ignorant folk that need buttons. https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp.exe ezpz lemon fuck your profits.
If you're having trouble with ads or watching videos that you're supposed to be able to in your country, (otherwise you'll need to use a vpn) you can use this nifty little ripper.
item.dc:creator: DietLoki

item.title: My 3rd grade teacher was alarmed at my homework.
item.description: I kind of wish I could go back in time and see the look on my teacher's face as he awkwardly tries to deal with third grade me in this situation. With today being the first annual punch a Nazi day, I thought I'd share this fun anecdote from my childhood.
item.dc:creator: whatsisname

item.title: Memes vol 291
item.description:
I’d do anything for booty shorts with military secrets on the butt
Be honest
*me pulling up to work in the sluts train car*
If ya nasty
I used to play mancala by myself because I’m an only child
I had a leash as a kid. Here’s the way I see it: if the kid who fell into the gorilla enclosure had been wearing a leash, Harambe would still be here.
“It’s not my fault I have a heavy flow and a wide set vagina!”
Scruffy tax
Froggy tax
Nessie tax

item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Eye didn't see that coming
item.description: Scared the shit out of me. My right eye is still extremely dilated, so eye am just waiting it out and hoping the Dr. is right. If it doesn't go back to normal in a couple hours eye might start to worry again. eye am genuinely trying to ward off a panic attack. So, yeah, PSA, don't accidentally get plant food in your eye, it creates a super freaky reaction. While eye have you here, wanna hear a joke? It will help me keep my mind off things. What do you call a snake thats 3.14 meters long? A P-eye-THON! Fuck I hope my eye is ok. It should be fine. The dr. said it would be fine... *** Update: The dilation went away, and now I just have a water drop sized red spot on my eye, which is far less intimidating than the grotesque uneven dilation thing. Vision is no longer blurred. Just a few natural tears here and there which feel very healthy. Per the Dr's orders I closed all my windows and wore sunglasses for the afternoon. At the moment, its hard to explain, but my eye just feels exausted, which is a very hard thing to find words for. Like, imagine if your eye had nausea, or a non visible bruise? Anyways, I think Im cool now. On the real though, thanks so much for caring. I was genuinely in panic attack mode for a minute there and freaked out. After those Dr phone calls I couldn't just sit here alone and cope without company.
item.dc:creator: METROlD

item.title: Do not. Vote for. Donald Trump. That person knows nothing of service, sacrifice, or gratitude. Contrast with President Biden whose own sons served.
item.description:
Compare the messages. Which one of these authors represents YOUR values?
He stayed for 70 minutes shaking the hands of each new commissioned 2Lt
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: This sucks
item.description: Well, this sucks. I picked out my bulbs and decorations weeks ago and was super excited for some nice weather so I could get started gardening. I had little garden gnomes and ceramic mushrooms, and I got a bunch of tulip and lily bulbs. I went back the next day to water my plot, and the decorations had all been smashed. It was as if someone just tore through all the dirt, and about 80% of my bulbs were on the ground as well. It's super disappointing.
item.dc:creator: EowynsTerribleStew

item.title: Missing a good friend today...
item.description: A1C Shaquille Hargrove was one of the best of us. Always quick with a joke and his laugh was infectious. No matter what went down on the Ops Floor, he was quick to get us back on track. Still missing you 11 years later, wingman.
item.dc:creator: xcanadiandevilx

item.title: Confession Time
item.description: I like seeing a Nazi get punched as much as the next guy… but I use this platform for maymays… *EDIT* It seems like there is a bit more backstory as to why the Imgur community is posting these gifs. I assumed it was just a Memorial Day thing but I guess it’s kind of related to imgur and its mod choices?

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
mmm hmm
every time
legend
better than microwaving fish in the break room
just did
what a great idea
same but a dude
note to self: don't become a hostage negotiator
i'm arriving
no thank you?
do it
is that 'chode' you're wearing?
no
good ole maglite
as is tradition
and on that note
that's it for me... have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Fmr2mars - Music Makers YouTube: https://youtu.be/TsLoT1GczWA?si=FIM-6VIR_xI2pTuT Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/2TdYrxyc6eohp8VWTSEUDc?si=6f5ddf1784f24a95

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.dc:creator: JebidiahBeetus

item.title: Once again, somebody dumped puppies near my house. :(
item.description:
A boy & a girl... IDK why people think a trailer park is a good place to dump dogs they can't afford to take care of - like we're over here doing better? Anyways, I called them over and fed them, and they haven't left since. (They're really skinny.) They're about 8-9 weeks old.
That's the little girl...
And the boy - they're both sweet as can be. If I didn't already have 6 dogs, I'd take them in, but for now all I can do is feed them and try to find them homes.
If you're in the Lubbock, Tx area and looking to adopt a puppy, please message me or tag me in the comments!
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

item.title: Little kid took kitten and momma said nope
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9
